question: Study the given information carefully and answer the question that follows In M.A. Social Work final year there are five papers of 100 marks each. Following are the passing criteria in each paper and the course. A student must :-
options: a) secure at least 40 marks in each paper except paper V, where passing marks are 50
b) pass paper V and at least any 2 other papers to appear (re-appear) again in
c) Up to 2 grace marks each may be given in any of the two papers or maximum 4 marks
d) Grace marks equivalent of 2% of the total final year course marks may be given to a
He must be declared fail in the course
He must be declared pass in the course.
He must be asked to re-appear for paper I.
He must be asked to re-appear for paper Il and V.
answer: He must be declared fail in the course
